zh.lifeSummary: 當John Tremayne於1450年出生在英國英格蘭戴文可拉頓 雷利時，他的父親Sir Thomas Tremayne50歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Carew49歲。他和Jane Warre至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1504年8月31日在英國英格蘭戴文拉梅頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Tremayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tremaine
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from one or more places in Cornwall named Tremayne (Saint Columb Major, Crowan, Saint Martin in Meneage), Tremaine, or Tremain (Pelynt). The placenames all derive from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + men ‘stone’, with the exception of Tremaine, which may have menegh, plural of manach ‘monk’, as the final element.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Tremayne was born in 1450, in Colaton Raleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Tremayne, was 50 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Carew, was 49. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Jane Warre. He died on 31 August 1504, in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Tremayne est né en 1450, à Colaton Raleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Tremayne, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Carew, avait 49 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Jane Warre. Il est décédé le 31 août 1504, à Lamerton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Colaton Raleigh, Devon, England, United: Colaton Raleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Tremayne 1450 in Colaton Raleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Tremayne 50 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Carew 49. Er hatte mit Jane Warre mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 31. August 1504 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Tremayneが1450年にイギリスイギリスデボンコラトン ラレイグで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Tremayneは50歳，母Lady Elizabeth Carewは49歳であった。彼はJane Warreとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1504年8月31日にイギリスイギリスデボンラムルトンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Tremayne(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 콜라턴 라리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Tremayne(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Carew(은)는 49세였다. 그는 Jane Warre(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 8월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 램르턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Tremayne родился в 1450 г. в местности колатон реилиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Tremayne было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Carew, 49. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Jane Warre. Он умер 31 августа 1504 г. в местности лэмиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.
